features.title: 多源数据收集与统一格式化

情绪分类数据集完成统一格式化

features.title: Twitter 数据的价格弱监督打标
features.description: 基于价格窗口为无标签社交数据生成 Bullish/Bearish/Neutral 标签。
features.evidence: No verified weak-labeling output is present in this repository yet.

loss 与 checkpoint 证据记录完成

features.title: 阶段二 LoRA-Sentiment 加密情绪微调与评估
features.description: 完成情绪分类微调并输出自动化评估指标。

features.title: LLM 推理管线与 API 接口封装
features.description: 提供 Chatbot 调用的 sentiment 与 generation Python 函数。
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Implemented deterministic mock/fallback wrappers for `predict_sentiment`, `batch_predict_sentiment`, and `generate_response` under `lora/src/inference`. 2026-04-28 update: replaced the temporary custom endpoint plan with the verified AutoDL OpenAI-compatible vLLM `/chat/completions` integration. `predict_sentiment` uses `sentiment-lora`, normalizes lower-case labels, and fills missing scores; `generate_response` uses `ift-lora` and strips `<|eot_id|>`. Verified with `cd lora && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (7 passed), direct AutoDL real-mode calls through the local SSH tunnel returning Bullish sentiment and non-empty ift-lora text, and Chatbot isolated `USE_MOCK=false RAG_USE_MOCK=true` API verification.
verification: mock/fallback functions return shared dataclass shapes
real mode without remote configuration raises RuntimeError
AutoDL remote LoRA endpoint integration succeeds
